(c) Taking option (c),
As sum of digits of 583 = 5 + 8 + 3 = 16
and sum of digits of 488 = 4 + 8 + 8 = 20
Similarly, sum of digits of 293 = 2 + 9 + 3 = 14
and Sum of digits of 378 = 3 + 7 + 8 = 18
Here, difference of both are (20 - 16) = (18 - 14) = 4
∴ ? = 378

(c) Second is the square of the first number.
As, 11² = 121
Similarly, 25² = 625

(c) Second number is the digit sum of the 1st number.
As, 5 + 5 = 10
Similarly, 8 + 8 = 16

(d) First number is multiplied by 5 to get second number.
As, 14 × 5 = 70
Similarly, 75 × 5 = 375

(d) The relationship is a³ : a².
As,
27 : 9 Similarly, 729 : 81
↓   ↓           ↓    ↓
3³   3²          9³   9²
(d) The difference between the 1st and 2nd digit of the numbers is 5.

(d) The numbers are perfect square.
Let us see
As, 144 = 12², 256 = 16², 324 = 18²

(d) All are prime numbers.
Similarly, 625 = 25²

(c) All the numbers are perfect cubes.
Let us see
As, 8 = 2³
1331 = 11³
4913 = 17³
Similarly, 64 = 4³
(c) Set of consecutive odd prime numbers.
(c) In (12, 20, 28), every next number is obtained by adding 8 with the previous number and similarly, in (18, 30, 42), every next number is obtained by adding 12 with the previous number.

(c) In each set
2nd number = 1st number × 7
and 3rd number = 1st number × 8
Let us see
As, 14 = 2 × 7
and 16 = 2 × 8
Similarly, 21 = 3 × 7
and 24 = 3 × 8
(b) Each set is made of the digits 2, 4, 6, 8.

(c) In each set,
2nd number = 1st number + 101
3rd number = 2nd number + 101
Let us see
As, 223 + 101 = 324
and 324 + 101 = 425
Similarly, 554 + 101 = 655
and 655 + 101 = 756
